Empty Href Links Test Page

These links have href="#" or href="" and no onclick handler. Clicking them scrolls to the top of the page (for #) or reloads the page (for empty string) — neither is the intended destination.

Home ← href="#", no onclick
Products ← href="#", no onclick
Contact Us ← href="" (empty string), no onclick
Sign In ← href="#", no onclick
Get Started ← href="" (empty string), no onclick
This one has an onclick handler (not flagged)

Back to index
